name: Tee Times Indoor Golf
about: Tee Times Indoor Golf is a virtual sports simulator venue located at the Roots Athletic Center in Westfield, MA. It features two side-by-side bays equipped with 17-foot wide by 11-foot tall projection screens, providing an immersive experience for playing a variety of golf courses, utilizing chipping and putting practice areas, and engaging in numerous golf-related games. Beyond golf, the facility supports a range of other sports including soccer, lacrosse, foot golf, handball, hockey, and shooting sports games. The venue is accessible to golfers of all skill levels, with state-of-the-art systems offering data and analytics to help both newcomers and professionals practice and improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art HD Golf simulator technology with real course data for authentic gameplay
Variety of activities including golf, multi-sport games, and data analytics for all skill levels
Flexible rental options for private parties and events, including facility rentals outside regular hours

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy is not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art system with 3D modeling software using real course data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the website states 'Bring your clubs in and give it try!'

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar. BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The pricing structure shows 4 golfers can play for 2 hours, suggesting it takes roughly 2 hours for a group of 4 to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a variety of multi-sport games suitable for all ages and is promoted as a family-friendly environment.
